## What does this PR do?

_A short description of the change._

## Related issue

Closes # (delete if not applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (wrong answer, broken UI, logic error)
- [ ] New questions (specify competence code and count)
- [ ] Question improvement (better wording, clearer explanation)
- [ ] Code improvement (refactor, performance, accessibility)
- [ ] Documentation

## Question checklist (if adding or editing questions)

- [ ] Each correct answer is unambiguous and traceable to an official source (DigComp 2.2/3.0, GDPR, WCAG 2.2, etc.)
- [ ] No verbatim text reproduced from source PDFs
- [ ] Wrong options are plausible distractors, not obviously incorrect
- [ ] Explanation cites the relevant concept without inventing facts
- [ ] IDs are unique and follow the `area.competence.serial` convention
- [ ] Difficulty rating (1/2/3) matches the actual cognitive demand

## Tested in

- [ ] Chrome
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Safari
